raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es fazziju uhs to Keh-
inu: Lai tas Kehninsch muh-
chan dshwo! Radeht ne buhtu
mans Waigs noskummis? jo
as Pilsfahts/ manno Tehwu
tappu Nams irr pohstā/ un
oinno Wahrtis irr no Ugguns
prihtas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch fazzija
hs manni: Ko tu tad nn mek-
? Tad peeluhdsu es to Deewu
o Debbes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es fazziju uhs to Keh-
inu: Ja tas tam Kehnixam
atiht/ un ja taws Kalps tawa
Brecktchā patizzigs irraid/ tad
ribbetu tu manni fuhtiht uhs
uhdu/ uhs to Pilsfahtu/ to
tappu manno Tehwu/ ka es to
staifit.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Kehninsch
s manni ar to Kehnixinni/ kas
hnis winnu fehdeja: Zik ilgi
id tu palikfi nohst? un kad nahk-
tu atpakkat? un tas patikke
m Kehnixam/ ka winsch manni
htija/ kad es winnam nospree-
u Laiku biju lizzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl fazziju es us to Keh-
nu: Ja tas tam Kehnixam pa-
hk/ tad laud man Grahmatas
htas tohp us teem Semmes-
alditajeem winnpufs Uppes/
tee mann pahrwadda/ tee-
uns es us Juhda nahkschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka arri weenn Grahmatu
hs Affarvu/ to Meschu Uhs-
ugu/ kas tam Kehnixam pee-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nahzu es pee teem
Semmes Walditajeem winn-
pufs Uppes/ un dewu teem ta
Kehnixa Grahmatas. Un tas
Kehninsch bij Karra Wirfue-
kus un Jahtneekus ar manni
fuhtijis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Saneballats tas
Oroniteris/ un Tobijas tas
Kalps/ tas Ammoniteris to dsir-
deja/ ruhpe tas winxeem ar lee-
lu Ruhpeschannu/ ka weens Zil-
weks bija nahzis/ ko labbu mek-
leht preefsch Israēta Behrnerm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es nahzu us Jerusa-
leini/ un btju tur trihs Deenas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlohs es Nakti/
es/ un mas Wihri ar manni/ un
ne stahstiju nekahdain Zilwekan/
ko Deews bija manna Sirdi de-
wis pee Jerusalemes darriht/ un
nekahds Lohps bija ar manni/
bes ka tas/ us ko es jahju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es isgahju zaur Ee-
lejas Wahrtim Nakti/ fabnis
to Puhta Akku/ lihos Suhou-
Wahrtin/ un es pahrlubkoju
tohs Jerusalemes Muhrus/ kas
nolausiti bija/ un winno Wahrt-
tis no Ugguns aprihtas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es jahju pahri uhs
Akka-Wahrtim/ un ta Kehnina
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
